title: Minimal Combat
description: Want to get an edge over your opponents without deviating from the vanilla feel? Then this is the resource pack for you!
body:
# Welcome to Minimal Combat! 

This resource pack changes some textures to enhance the visibility and awareness in combat situations. 

It doesn't matter if you are grinding Skywars or casually hunting down cows in your survival world, this resource pack is suited for everyone!

## Integrated Resource Packs
This resource pack uses features from my other resource packs. If you don't like this bundle, you can always install the individual features you like!


**[Rainbow Enchant Glint](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rainbow-enchant-glint-universal)** - Adds rainbow color to the enchanting glint. Supports 1.15+ all the way to the latest Minecraft version!

**[Small Handhelds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-handhelds)** - Reduced size of items held in the player's hand

**[Bow Charger](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bow-charger)** - Adds colors to the charging stages of the bow and crossbow

## Versions
### V2.8
- Updated files from the most recent [Bow Charger](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bow-charger), [Rainbow Enchant Glint (Universal)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rainbow-enchant-glint-universal) and [Small Handhelds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-handhelds)
- Changed the critical hit particle texture to be smaller and less distracting
- Updated pack.mcmeta to support 1.13+ all the way to the most recent Minecraft version

### V2.7
- Added support for copper golem statue, shelf and copper sword
- Fixed an issue where the rainbow enchantment glint didn't show armor worn by a player
- Updated pack.mcmeta to new format for 1.21.9 and beyond

### V2.6
- Updated the file structure of the gui folder to fix gui textures not showing in Minecraft 1.20.2 and above

### V2.5
- Reduced scale of the Mace and Heavy Core

### V2.4
- Fixed the scale of the following items: Goat Horn, Bamboo, Blaze Rod, Bone, Debug Stick, and Stick
### V2.3
- Made the scale of tools a bit bigger
- Removed the shortened textures of all axes, pickaxes, shovels and hoes
### V2.2
- Recolored Golden Apple texture to be more in line with the coloring of the vanilla golden apple
- Made Golden Apple compatible with the mod [Eating Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)
- Lowered position of Blocks when held in hand
- Scaled down the Shield and fixed some inconsistencies with the positioning when held in hand
### V2.1
- Fixed an issue where tools and weapons weren't smaller than vanilla when held in the left hand
### V2
- Made all items, tools, weapons and blocks smaller when held in hand (Also available as a separate resource pack called [Smaller Handhelds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/smaller-handhelds))
- Disabled shortened textures of all pickaxes, axes, shovels and hoes as they are no longer needed (They are still accessible by moving those textures out of the "Old Tools" folder in the item textures folder) 
- Changed the Crit Particle to be less obstructive
### V1.4
- Items held in a hand are made smaller and therefore less obstructive (Doesn't affect blocks and tools) 
- Fixed the item texture in the hotbar of the shortened 2 tall flowers and grass versions
### V1.3
- Changed style of Rainbow XP Bar & Horse Jump bar (From the resource pack [Simple Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-bars))
- Recolored Trapped Chest texture
- Changed colors of the Entity Arrow texture to be more striking
- Made Shield and Shield Blocking animation even lower
### V1.2
- Custom Golden Apple Texture (Credits to [**Chr7st**](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nFK1M7WbGgA))
- Edited Powder Snow and Trapped Chest texture to be more distinctive from it's counterparts
### V1.1
- Adjusted Grass, Tall Grass and most 2 block tall flowers for better visibility
- Golden Apple Hunger Bar → Compatible with [**Appleskin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)! (Credits to [**Chr7st**](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nFK1M7WbGgA) for golden apple hunger bar texture)
### V1
- Minimalistic Swords & Shortened Tools for better visibility
- Color Changing Bow (Also available as a separate resource pack called [**Bow Charger**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bow-charger))
- Rainbow Enchanting Glint & Rainbow XP Bar
- Lowered Shield
- Lowered Fire & Soul Fire Texture
- Removed Carved Pumpkin Blur
- Attack Indicator color changed to cyan
- Removed Attack Indicator Recharge
- Made Rain & Snow less obstructive
- Ultra Small Crosshair
- Added more striking crit particles to track opponents arrows more easily


<details>
<summary>Known Incompatibilities</summary>

*Item Stitching Fix* from [**Vanilla Tweaks**](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)

**Solution:** Remove *Item Stitching Fix* from your Vanilla Tweaks resource pack and use the mod [**Model Gap Fix**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) instead.


</details>
